rows.label: tlk42360113_01_msg0001
rows.name:
[ML:Feeling kind=Anger ]Right, check! Left, check!
Front, check! Goldmund
security, no problems!

rows.label: tlk42360113_01_msg0002
rows.name:
Avaritia is the number one trading
nation in Alst, so we have to be
thorough with security, mo!

rows.label: tlk42360113_01_msg0003
rows.name:
But I've worked too hard lately...
mo. Wonder if Rimurimu comes
to relieve me... mo.
